title: edhoc: fix hkdf_expand missing return warning
description: EDHOC compile checks for project-LICHEN-9nrr.24 exposed an existing warning in lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c: hkdf_expand() can reach the end of a non-void function. Reproduce with: west build -b qemu_x86 lichen/tests/oscore -d build/lichen_edhoc_config_qemu --pristine=always -- -DCONFIG_LICHEN_EDHOC=y. Fix the control flow and add/adjust focused EDHOC coverage if practical.
close_reason: Fixed EDHOC hkdf_expand() control flow by returning 0 on success and propagating that result through edhoc_kdf() after wiping the info buffer. Verified qemu_x86 EDHOC compile paths with CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK disabled and enabled; both are clean for the previous control-reaches-end warning. Two review passes completed; no follow-up Beads needed.
